query:
UPDATE wa_conversations c
SET c.contactPushName = (
  SELECT wc.savedName
  FROM wa_contacts wc 
  WHERE wc.jid = c.remoteJid 
  AND wc.savedName IS NOT NULL AND wc.savedName != ''
  AND wc.savedName NOT REGEXP '^[0-9+\\-\\s\\(\\)]+$'
  LIMIT 1
)
WHERE (c.contactPushName IS NULL OR c.contactPushName = '' OR c.contactPushName REGEXP '^[0-9+\\-\\s\\(\\)]+$')
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM wa_contacts wc2 
  WHERE wc2.jid = c.remoteJid 
  AND wc2.savedName IS NOT NULL AND wc2.savedName != ''
  AND wc2.savedName NOT REGEXP '^[0-9+\\-\\s\\(\\)]+$'
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute UPDATE wa_conversations c
SET c.contactPushName = (
  SELECT wc.savedName
  FROM wa_contacts wc 
  WHERE wc.jid = c.remoteJid 
  AND wc.savedName IS NOT NULL AND wc.savedName != ''
  AND wc.savedName NOT REGEXP '^[0-9+\\-\\s\\(\\)]+$'
  LIMIT 1
)
WHERE (c.contactPushName IS NULL OR c.contactPushName = '' OR c.contactPushName REGEXP '^[0-9+\\-\\s\\(\\)]+$')
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM wa_contacts wc2 
  WHERE wc2.jid = c.remoteJid 
  AND wc2.savedName IS NOT NULL AND wc2.savedName != ''
  AND wc2.savedName NOT REGEXP '^[0-9+\\-\\s\\(\\)]+$'
)
